title: astronium fraxinifolium var. fraxinifolium
intro: Astronium fraxinifolium var. fraxinifolium, also known as the Brazilian ash or golden ash, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of South America. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that may help alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Astronium fraxinifolium var. fraxinifolium include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of this plant include extracts and infusions that can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
